title: Knotfile
description: Configuration schema for the knot dotfiles manager (https://github.com/oxgrad/knot). Place this file named exactly 'Knotfile' at the root of your dotfiles repository.

packages.description: A map of named package definitions. Each key is a logical name for a dotfile bundle (e.g. 'nvim', 'zsh').

package.description: A dotfile package: a source directory whose files are symlinked into a target directory.

source.description: Path to the source directory containing dotfiles. Relative paths are resolved from the Knotfile's directory. Supports ~ expansion (e.g. ~/dotfiles/nvim).

target.description: Destination directory where symlinks will be created. Supports ~ expansion (e.g. ~/.config/nvim).

ignore.description: List of glob patterns (matched against file basenames only) to exclude from symlinking.

items.description: A glob pattern as understood by Go's filepath.Match (e.g. '*.md', '.DS_Store', 'LICENSE').

condition.description: An optional condition that gates whether this package is applied on the current system.

os.description: Only apply this package on the given operating system. The value is compared against Go's runtime.GOOS.
